title: bridge signing secrets held in axum State as plain String, not zeroized on drop
description: SlackState.signing_secret (bridge-slack), AsState.hs_token (bridge-matrix), and TeamsState.security_token (bridge-teams) are all plain String values cloned into long-lived axum state and Arc-shared with every request handler. None are zeroized when the bridge exits. Signing/HMAC key material stays in process memory until the OS reclaims it — increases window for core-dump or swap exposure.
